overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit cyberpunk city. The player character moves from an elevated highway past scaffolding and skyscrapers, through intersections and commercial plazas, encountering pedestrians with illuminated umbrellas and futuristic vehicles.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked highway next to a building covered in metal scaffolding

notable_agents.action: futuristic car with bright headlights approaching from the distance

entered.detail: tall building covered in metal scaffolding and construction barriers with illuminated windows
concrete barrier separating the walkway from oncoming traffic lanes
large vertical digital billboard emitting cyan light between skyscrapers
dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked elevated highway at night, flanked by a scaffolding-covered building on the right and traffic barriers on the left. Neon-lit skyscrapers loom in the foggy distance while vehicles with bright headlights approach from ahead.

events.description: exits the narrow highway corridor and enters a more open plaza area beneath an overpass
crosses the street at an intersection, moving from highway to plaza sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet street and entering the plaza area beneath the overpass structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking along the sidewalk near the Ferguson building

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating a canopy over the plaza area
commercial building with illuminated 'Ferguson' signage on the facade
tall palm tree standing in the plaza near the crosswalk
green directional street sign suspended over the intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the enclosed highway to a semi-covered urban plaza beneath a massive overpass. The camera crosses the street near a building labeled 'Ferguson' and passes palm trees as it moves deeper into the plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with ALL FOODS megastore

events.description: crosses the red-marked pedestrian crosswalk in front of the ALL FOODS building
encounters pedestrians carrying illuminated umbrellas in the rain

agents.ego_description: crossing the plaza crosswalk and approaching the large ALL FOODS commercial building

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying a glowing orange umbrella crossing the path
pedestrian with a purple illuminated umbrella walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large commercial building with prominent orange 'ALL FOODS' signage and glass facade
massive concrete elevated highway running parallel to the plaza
pedestrian crosswalk with distinctive red pavement markings
large concrete planters containing trees and greenery in the plaza

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a wide commercial plaza dominated by the ALL FOODS megastore on the right. Pedestrians with glowing umbrellas walk through the rain as the camera crosses the red-marked crosswalk, with the elevated highway structure looming overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk under elevated highway with neon storefronts

events.description: enters narrow street with neon storefronts tucked beneath the elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow sidewalk beneath the elevated highway past various neon-lit shop fronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking along the storefronts

entered.detail: row of commercial storefronts with bright teal and pink neon signage including 'Hustlers & Co'
vertical digital advertising screen mounted on a pillar under the highway
dark narrow alleyway ahead between buildings with distant neon lights

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into a narrow, enclosed sidewalk tucked beneath the elevated highway. The camera passes by neon-lit storefronts with vivid teal and pink signage, digital billboards mounted on concrete pillars, and scattered pedestrians, creating an intimate cyberpunk alley atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, rain-slicked highway into the dense, neon-lit corridors of a futuristic urban center. It begins on an elevated roadway flanked by scaffolding and traffic barriers, moving toward looming skyscrapers and the bright headlights of oncoming vehicles through a thick fog. As the camera descends from the highway, the scene opens into a semi-covered plaza where it passes a building labeled Ferguson and tropical palm trees beneath a massive overpass. The environment then expands into a wide commercial square dominated by the All Foods megastore, crossing a red-marked crosswalk amidst pedestrians carrying glowing umbrellas. Finally, the view shifts from the open plaza into a narrow, enclosed sidewalk tucked under the highway, passing vivid teal and pink storefronts and digital billboards mounted on concrete pillars.
